body:
### Problem With `laststatus=2` and split windows there are intersection cells that appear as statusline but can not controlled by 'statusline' option. Here is an example of the following 'init.vim': ```vim hi StatusLine guibg=Red hi StatusLineNC guibg=Yellow hi WinSeparator guibg=Blue hi GreenBg guibg=Green set statusline=%#GreenBg# wincmd s wincmd v | wincmd v wincmd j | wincmd v | wincmd k ``` Although 'statusline' is set to always have just green background, cells to its right in a split is always either `StatusLine` or `StatusLineNC`. --- The issue is similar to #36090. The vim/vim#19951 is also related. ### Expected behavior Treat those intersections as not part of the statusline and show continued vertical window separator instead. This can be achieved with the following diff:
Diff for vertical separator corner ```diff diff --git a/src/nvim/statusline.c b/src/nvim/statusline.c index f458efd8a7..80191fe139 100644 --- a/src/nvim/statusline.c +++ b/src/nvim/statusline.c @@ -93,12 +93,7 @@ void win_redr_status(win_T *wp) hlf_T group = HLF_C; // May need to draw the character below the vertical separator. if (wp->w_vsep_width != 0 && wp->w_status_height != 0 && redrawing()) { - schar_T fillchar; - if (stl_connected(wp)) { - fillchar = fillchar_status(&group, wp); - } else { - fillchar = wp->w_p_fcs_chars.vert; - } + schar_T fillchar = wp->w_p_fcs_chars.vert; int attr = win_hl_attr(wp, (int)group); grid_line_start(&default_gridview, W_ENDROW(wp)); grid_line_put_schar(W_ENDCOL(wp), fillchar, attr); ```
And it looks like this: And here is a comparison with default statusline and colorscheme:
Current and with vertical separators
One useful side of this is that (*I think*) it would allow to remove and simplify more code (like [this `stl_connected` function](https://github.com/neovim/neovim/blob/72bc6c5801867e8f99a87737a64c1713ceac1e01/src/nvim/statusline.c#L120-L140)).

comment_data.body:
> related
> 
> * [laststatus 3 (beautiful separators) + 0 (no status line) #33041](https://github.com/neovim/neovim/issues/33041)

I don't think it is *quite* related. Since this case is specifically for `laststatus=2`, i.e. it is not possible to adjust 'statusline' option.

---

I personally prefer the "box drawing intersections" behavior, but "vertical separator" is also nice. Both are much better than the current behavior.

labels.description: Need a decision with a clear, actionable path.
labels.name: needs:decision

title: Draw window separator between adjacent statuslines

type.description: A request, idea, or new functionality
type.name: Enhancement
